notes: Egypt row/QID/photo audit 2026-05-24: verifier confirmed the local rows match the Wikipedia Egypt squad table, a 27-player preliminary squad announced May 20 with final squad due May 29. No clean Wikimedia photo was found for Mostafa Shobeir, Mohamed Alaa, El Mahdy Soliman, Tarek Alaa, Mohanad Lasheen, Nabil Emad, Mostafa Ziko, Haissem Hassan, Aqtay Abdallah, or Hamza Abdelkarim; these rows are marked reviewed-none. No confirmed Wikidata QID was found for Mohamed Alaa, Mostafa Ziko, or Aqtay Abdallah. Hamza Abdelkarim Q134513932 is the intended sitelink/ID item, but its Wikidata English label/description are bad, so local display metadata was corrected while preserving the QID caveat. Existing DOB/current-club conflicts are Wikidata or third-party conflicts; squad-table values remain canonical unless a stronger official source is adopted later.

Egypt QID follow-up 2026-05-25: confirmed Mostafa Ziko as Wikidata Q121537482 via the matching footballer item and Transfermarkt ID 896616; Mohamed Alaa and Aqtay Abdallah remain without unambiguous Wikidata QIDs and have identity_review notes.
